items.title: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
items.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
items.author: freeCodeCamp
items.summary_zh: freeCodeCamp.org的开源代码库和课程，涵盖编程、数学和计算机科学 | 开发者可以免费获取完整的自学路径，适合初学者和进阶学习者 | 无需注册即可访问所有课程内容，是构建全栈技能的一站式资源
items.summary_en: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum covers math, programming, and computer science | Developers get a complete self-learning path for free, suitable for beginners and advanced learners | No sign-up required; it's a one-stop resource for building full-stack skills

items.title: obra/superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
items.author: obra
items.summary_zh: Obra/Superpowers 是一个新兴的智能体技能框架与软件开发方法论，强调通过「技能」而非传统微服务或函数来构建 AI 代理应用。该框架提供了一套标准化的技能定义、编排与执行机制，让开发者能够像搭积木一样组合多个 AI 代理的能力，实现复杂工作流。其核心创新在于将提示工程、工具调用和状态管理统一封装为可复用的技能单元，并内置了监控与调试支持。该方法论旨在解决大语言模型应用在可靠性、可维护性上的痛点，尤其适合需要多步骤推理和外部工具协作的场景。受益群体包括 AI 应用开发者、提示工程师和平台架构师，他们能借此更高效地构建健壮的代理系统。在 GitHub 上趋势高涨的原因在于，代理（Agent）范式正成为 LLM 落地的关键方向，而 Superpowers 提供了首个开箱即用、方法论与工具并重的解决方案。
items.summary_en: Obra/Superpowers is an emerging agentic skills framework and software development methodology that reimagines AI agent construction through reusable 'skills' rather than traditional microservices or functions. It provides a standardized way to define, orchestrate, and execute skills, enabling developers to compose multiple AI agents like building blocks for complex workflows. The core innovation lies in unifying prompt engineering, tool calling, and state management into self-contained skill units, with built-in observability and debugging. This methodology targets pain points of LLM applications—reliability and maintainability—and is especially suited for multi-step reasoning and tool-augmented scenarios. Developers, prompt engineers, and platform architects benefit from more robust agent systems. Its trending status on GitHub reflects the growing importance of the agent paradigm in LLM deployment, and Superpowers stands out as a production-ready, methodology-driven solution.

items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: 微软开源的Python工具，用于将各类文件和办公文档转换为Markdown格式 | 开发者可轻松集成到文档处理流程中，实现自动化内容转换 | 支持常见文档类型（如Word、Excel、PDF），适合博客迁移或知识库整理
items.summary_en: Microsoft's open-source Python tool converts files and office documents to Markdown format | Developers can easily integrate it into document processing pipelines for automated conversion | Supports common types like Word, Excel, and PDF; ideal for blog migration or knowledge base organization

items.title: mattpocock/skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.author: mattpocock
items.summary_zh: mattpocock/skills 仓库收录了来自作者 .claude 目录的真实工程师技能文件。| 开发者可以学习如何定义和复用 AI 助手技能模板，提升编程协作效率。| 该仓库可能成为社区共享 AI 技能配置的参考范例。
items.summary_en: The mattpocock/skills repository contains real engineer skills straight from the author's .claude directory. | It provides developers with reusable AI interaction skill templates that improve collaboration with coding assistants. | This repo may set a community standard for sharing AI skill configurations.

items.title: krahets/hello-algo
items.description: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现
items.author: krahets
items.summary_zh: 《Hello 算法》是一本结合动画图解与一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。| 开发者可借助可视化动画和多种编程语言实现直观学习，支持 Python、Java、C++ 等十余种语言。| 作为开源互动教程，它大幅降低了算法学习门槛。
items.summary_en: Hello Algo is a data structures and algorithms tutorial featuring animated diagrams and one-click code execution. | Developers can learn visually through animations and real code implementations across 10+ languages including Python, Java, C++, and more. | As an open-source interactive resource, it significantly lowers the barrier to learning algorithms.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: IPTV-org 收集了全球公开的 IPTV 电视频道列表。| 对开发者来说，它为测试流媒体应用或构建自定义播放器提供了丰富的数据源。| 该项目由社区持续维护，频道覆盖广泛且不断更新。
items.summary_en: IPTV-org is a curated collection of publicly available IPTV channels from around the world. | It provides developers with a rich data source for building IPTV players or testing streaming applications. | This community-maintained project offers wide coverage and is constantly updated.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: 这是一个利用AI大模型一键生成高清短视频的工具。|开发者无需视频制作经验即可快速产出高质量视频内容，适合营销和社交媒体。|核心价值在于降低视频创作门槛，极大提升内容生产效率。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo is a tool that uses AI LLMs to generate high-quality short videos with one click. | Developers can produce professional video content without any video editing skills, making it ideal for marketing and social media. | Its key insight is dramatically lowering the barrier to video creation, boosting content production efficiency.

items.title: ruvnet/RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.author: ruvnet
items.summary_zh: RuView能将普通WiFi信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测功能，无需摄像头。|开发者可基于该技术构建隐私友好的智能家居、健康监测等应用。|核心创新在于利用现有WiFi基础设施实现非视觉感知，开拓全新交互场景。
items.summary_en: RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection without using any camera. | Developers can build privacy-friendly smart home, health monitoring, and occupancy detection applications using existing WiFi infrastructure. | Its key insight is enabling non-visual sensing via WiFi, opening new interaction paradigms while preserving privacy.

items.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.author: Egonex-AI
items.summary_zh: 这是一个将代码转化为可交互知识图谱的工具，支持探索、搜索和提问。|开发者能直观理解复杂代码库的结构和逻辑，提升代码审查和调试效率。|核心价值在于“教”而非“炫”，通过图谱促进深度理解，适用于任意编程语言。
items.summary_en: Understand-Anything transforms any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. | Developers can visually grasp complex code structures and logic, improving code review, onboarding, and debugging speed. | Its key insight is prioritizing teaching over impressing, enabling deep comprehension through graph-based exploration, and working with any programming language.

items.title: makeplane/plane
items.description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.
items.author: makeplane
items.summary_zh: Plane 是一个开源的项目管理平台，可作为 Jira、Linear 等工具的替代品，支持任务、冲刺、文档和三方集成。| 开发者可以自托管部署，获得完全可控的工作流管理能力。| 其开源特性为团队提供了定制化和数据隐私的保障。
items.summary_en: Plane is an open-source project management platform that serves as an alternative to Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp, supporting tasks, sprints, docs, and triage. | Developers can self-host or use the cloud version, gaining full control over workflows. | Its open-source nature allows teams to customize and maintain data privacy.

items.title: A backdoor in a LinkedIn job offer
items.author: lwhsiao
items.summary_zh: 一个LinkedIn工作招聘信息中发现后门。| 开发者需要警惕招聘链接中的恶意附件或链接，避免系统被入侵。| 关键教训：始终验证招聘方身份和链接真伪。
items.summary_en: A backdoor was discovered in a LinkedIn job offer, likely through a malicious attachment or link. | Developers must exercise caution when opening job application materials to prevent security breaches. | Always verify the sender's identity and URL authenticity before interacting with job offers.

items.title: Running local models is good now
items.author: jfb
items.summary_zh: 如今运行本地AI模型已经变得非常可行和有效。| 开发者可避免依赖云API，降低延迟和成本，同时保护数据隐私。| 本地模型性能大幅提升，值得重新评估部署方案。
items.summary_en: Running local AI models has become practical and effective. | Developers can avoid cloud API costs and latency, while enhancing data privacy. | Significant improvements in local model performance make it worth reconsidering deployment strategies.

items.title: Iroh 1.0
items.author: chadfowler
items.summary_zh: Iroh 1.0 正式发布，这是一个点对点网络库。| 开发者可用它轻松构建去中心化应用，无需自行处理复杂网络逻辑。| 1.0 版本标志着该库达到稳定、可生产使用的成熟度。
items.summary_en: Iroh 1.0 has been released, a peer-to-peer networking library. | Developers can use it to easily build decentralized applications without handling complex networking logic. | The 1.0 milestone signifies stability and production-readiness.

items.title: Ask HN: Has anyone replaced Claude/GPT with a local model for daily coding?
items.author: cloudking
items.summary_zh: 询问是否有人已将日常编码工具从Claude/GPT切换至本地模型。| 本地模型提供隐私与离线优势，但性能可能不及云端AI，开发者需权衡利弊。| 社区经验显示，Llama和Mistral等本地模型已能胜任部分编码任务，但复杂场景仍需云服务。
items.summary_en: This Ask HN topic questions whether developers have replaced Claude/GPT with local models for daily coding. | For developers, local models offer privacy, offline use, and potential cost savings but may lack the performance of cloud-based AI. | Community reports indicate local models like Llama and Mistral handle many coding tasks effectively, though complex queries still favor cloud services.

items.title: SpaceX to buy Cursor for $60B
items.author: itsmarcelg
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 计划以600亿美元收购 AI 编程助手 Cursor。| 这一举动对开发者影响巨大，Cursor 可能整合到航天软件生态，改变 AI 编程工具竞争格局。| 天价收购凸显 AI 辅助开发工具的战略价值，但执行与整合是最大挑战。
items.summary_en: SpaceX intends to acquire Cursor, an AI-powered code assistant, for $60 billion. | Developers should watch how this reshapes the AI coding tool market and whether Cursor's features become tightly integrated with SpaceX's aerospace software stack. | The staggering valuation signals the high strategic importance of AI-assisted development, but the real test lies in post-acquisition integration and maintaining tool quality.

items.title: Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability
items.author: regnerba
items.summary_zh: Lore 是一个开源的可扩展版本控制系统。| 对于需要处理大型仓库或高并发的开发者，它提供了比传统 VCS 更优的性能表现。| 特别适合数据科学和大型二进制文件版本管理场景。
items.summary_en: Lore is an open-source version control system designed for scalability. | It offers developers better performance for large repositories and high-concurrency workflows compared to traditional VCS. | It is particularly suitable for versioning data science projects and large binary files.

items.title: Sixty percent of US consumers say 'AI' in brand messaging is a turnoff
items.author: thm
items.summary_zh: 调查显示60%美国消费者反感品牌消息中出现“AI”一词。|开发者应避免过度强调AI，以免用户产生负面联想。|在产品宣传中应更注重实际价值而非技术标签。
items.summary_en: 60% of US consumers find the term 'AI' in brand messaging off-putting. | Developers should avoid overemphasizing AI in marketing to prevent negative associations. | Focus on tangible benefits rather than technology buzzwords in product communication.

items.title: TinyWind: A pixel pirate sailing game with real wind physics (380k+ kms sailed)
items.author: tinywind
items.summary_zh: TinyWind 是一款像素风格的海盗帆船游戏，具备真实风力物理引擎，已航行超过38万公里。| 开发者可从中学习游戏物理模拟和用户参与度的结合。| 展示了独立游戏如何通过创新物理机制吸引玩家。
items.summary_en: TinyWind is a pixel-art pirate sailing game with real wind physics, having logged over 380,000 km sailed. | Developers can learn from its blend of physical simulation and engaging gameplay. | It showcases how indie games can attract players through innovative mechanics.

items.title: Firewood Splitting Simulator
items.author: memalign
items.summary_zh: 这是一款模拟劈柴的休闲游戏或交互应用。| 开发者可从中学习物理模拟、反馈机制或放松类游戏的实现。| 简单场景能检验引擎性能或作为趣味演示，编程门槛低但体验设计很重要。
items.summary_en: A casual game or interactive app that simulates splitting firewood with physics and visual feedback. | It offers developers a chance to explore basic physics simulation, user interaction loops, and relaxing game design patterns. | The minimal scope makes it easy to prototype but demands polish in feel and interface to engage users meaningfully.

items.title: GrapheneOS has been ported to Android 17
items.author: Cider9986
items.summary_zh: GrapheneOS已移植至Android 17，提供更强的隐私保护。|开发者可基于更安全的基础进行应用开发。|此举推动开源安全系统的更新，提升移动设备防护。
items.summary_en: GrapheneOS has been ported to Android 17, offering enhanced privacy features. | Developers can build apps on a more secure foundation. | This update advances open-source security systems for improved mobile protection.
